channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Crypto Tax Bills Face Pushback in House Committee Hearing
item.description: Pro-crypto Democrats questioned staking and mining tax exemptions Tuesday, while party leadership said the bills may need to wait until after the midterms.

item.title: Crypto tax bills a work-in-progress as U.S. House lawmakers pose concerns
item.description: The effort to push several tax bills is meant to be bipartisan, but the parties may not be comfortable with all details of the seven bills weighed by the panel.

item.title: EU Orders Meta to Open WhatsApp to Rival AI Chatbots—Meta Calls It 'Regulatory Overreach'
item.description: The European Commission has issued interim measures forcing Meta to restore third-party AI access to the WhatsApp Business API within five days.

item.title: Seattle-Area Man Gets Prison for Laundering Foreign Fraud Funds With Bitcoin, Ethereum
item.description: The fraudster took in nearly $100 million from victims before laundering funds via Bitcoin, Ethereum, and stablecoins.

item.title: December Trial Date Set for US Soldier Accused of Insider Trading on Polymarket
item.description: The insider trading case is the government's first to center on prediction markets.

item.title: Solana Institute CEO says CLARITY Act must shield open-source developers
item.description: Kristin Smith urged the Senate to preserve developer protections in the CLARITY Act, arguing open-source builders should not be regulated as financial intermediaries.

item.title: Securitize CEO says tokenized stocks could unlock a $5 trillion crypto market
item.description: At a panel at ETHConf, Carlos Domingo argued that bringing stocks and exchange-traded funds onchain could unlock a market far larger than today's roughly $30 billion tokenized asset sector.

item.title: A Quantum Clock Is Ticking for Bitcoin and Crypto—Here's How Stellar Is Preparing
item.description: The Stellar Development Foundation unveiled a three-step roadmap to prepare the XLM network for the coming quantum computing threat.

item.title: AI Malware Worm Adapts to New Targets in Real Time, Cybersecurity Experts Say
item.description: Researchers demonstrated an AI-powered worm that adapts to targets, generates attack strategies, and spreads across networks without cloud services.

item.title: Anthropic Rolls Out Claude Mythos 5 AI Model—Along With the Safer Fable 5 for the Public
item.description: Anthropic has released a full version of its cybersecurity-centric Claude Mythos model—along with a safer version for the general public.

item.title: Bitcoin may act as a ‘canary in the coal mine’ as risk-off pressure spreads: Bitwise
item.description: Bitwise research suggests that Bitcoin is leading a broader risk-off move across markets as global liquidity and stablecoin reserves remain elevated.

item.title: Kraken Named Official Crypto Exchange of FIFA World Cup 2026
item.description: Crypto exchange Kraken is teaming up with FIFA to sponsor the World Cup, with plans for "fan-focused" experiences in the U.S. and Europe.

item.title: The Hidden Code Problem: How Unverified Smart Contracts Are Becoming a Preferred Target for Attackers
item.description: Summary In the last six months, at least $36.7 million has been stolen from protocols whose source code was never… The post The Hidden Code Problem: How Unverified Smart Contracts Are Becoming a Preferred Target for Attackers appeared firs…

item.title: BBB refers prediction market Kalshi to state regulators over ad inquiry
item.description: A BBB advertising watchdog escalated its review of Kalshi after the prediction market platform declined to participate in an inquiry into influencer disclosure practices.

item.title: JUST IN: Traditional financial firms are rapidly embracing crypto, Axios reports. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE9pQU5DbklBMEhjYVR6X2ViQU4zakhVeFRPOHNFMUxLSm5PNGUyMjBEV0c4Nk02aXVFZ2ZFMjVHSHhuZm9KY1JtWGFVS2F5RnVfV3AtNWh0ckkxaXJDdDZRRVVn?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Traditional financial fir…

item.title: Crypto Lending Protocol Morpho Raises $175 Million to Aid Wall Street’s DeFi Push
item.description: Decentralized lending platform Morpho has secured $175 million in its latest funding round, highlighting the rise of curated lending vaults.

item.title: UK financial regulator moves to allow mutual funds 10% exposure to crypto ETNs
item.description: The Financial Conduct Authority proposed allowing some investment schemes to add exposure to crypto exchange-traded notes.

item.title: 5 corruption gaps Congress must close in the Clarity Act
item.description: The most consequential crypto legislation in the world is moving forward in the U.S. Senate. As written, it leaves the United States exposed to money laundering, sanctions evasion, and conflicts of interest at the highest levels of governm…

item.title: Bitcoin won't be "dead" for too long. Don't panic, in large friendly letters. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTE0zWFlPRG90YzA4UFBMVm1DYlVwWnZkRUJHOVhGRUVHT3hkZFd5ZVJSMG9ESkZwbDA2cEUwSVdxMEF6ZzFRTHJNa3Zpb2N5a2R6amtnMWdYdGprV245ZXJmNA?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitcoin won't be "dead" for too long…

item.title: MASSIVE WIPEOUT ACROSS STOCKS, METALS AND CRYPTO. $1.88 TRILLION wiped out in last 1 hour. S&P 500 is down -1.62%, wiping out $1.10 trillion. Nasdaq is down -2.50%, wiping out $880 billion. Gold is down -1.95%, wiping out $570 billion. Silver - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE5yNjY1b09qUUg5UGdyRXM4SW9TWWhNYmMyck9TS0RlR0lYZWVOSUR3YnJzT2FsYmNIQ05rNjNBMlNzSDNpRkFBMXd1MGhWSzhaUV9lM09RNWdnQ2hfRnJNclJyTQ?oc=5" target="_blank">MASSIVE WIPEOUT ACROSS STOCKS, M…

item.title: Bitcoin price slips toward $62K local lows as bear-market history keeps repeating
item.description: Bitcoin bear market analysis showed copycat BTC price moves ongoing despite new hopes of a US-Iran peace deal.

item.title: Trad.Fi, W3 target $650 million in onchain private credit using AI evaluation
item.description: Equipment-financing lender Trad.Fi is working with W3 to automate capital workflows and bring real-economy business lending onto public blockchain rails.

item.title: BREAKING: Total onchain crypto card payment volumes hit a record $833 million in May 2026, up +180% year-over-year. High performance networks such as Optimism and Solana have benefited from the growth in payment related activity. These networks ha - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTFBLeEVGeVJac19TM0F5QVcxa1RZaVpRaFdDRWRyS3k3Q0kwNUlwRV9FZGNtazRSVWFOOHJPOWdwVWVUN3BVVkVReEtSRjlZRGRRTmRkNFNYZGU5SlowLWRpdjlQeWNPUQ?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING: Total onchain cryp…

item.title: Ethena lands Janus Henderson backing as asset manager invests in ENA, eyes USDe distribution
item.description: The deal underscores the trend of traditional asset managers backing DeFi infrastructure, following BlackRock's Uniswap and Apollo's Morpho investments.

item.title: Come back after the summer, says one analyst on crypto markets
item.description: Bitcoin's growing divergence from tech stocks raises concerns as AI spending surges, says Quinn Thompson.

item.title: Elizabeth Warren Demands Answers on CFTC's Crypto and Prediction Market Oversight
item.description: The Massachusetts senator highlighted workforce cuts and enforcement changes at the regulator under the Trump administration.

item.title: Ways and Means Republicans rolled out six standalone bills and a discussion draft ahead of today’s crypto tax hearing at 2pm ET. The bills address crypto donations, mining and staking taxation, reporting requirements, tax treatment parity, voluntary disclosur - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE5DanVLcU41S3NXam9RZWhTOXd4MUtKOEJqY2hZLXY3eWRqc1VxbGNGWW9fQ2dPM0g3N2VmR3ppczVhakxMalJhVmxJYjBhVUgwYV9IWU5RT2xHVU51S0NrNUxlLU5XQQ?oc=5" target="_blank">Ways and Means Republicans r…

item.title: Bitcoin bottom? These four charts hint at BTC price dropping to $50K
item.description: A $50,000 Bitcoin price target remains in play despite BTC maintaining above $60,000 support for now, as multiple indicators warn the bottom may not be in.

item.title: BITCOIN ETF OUTFLOWS SLOW BUT CONTINUE Bitcoin ETFs saw $91.4M in net outflows on Monday, a slowdown from recent $300M–$500M daily withdrawals but still extending the negative trend, according to CoinGlass. Bitcoin fell 1.9% to $62,257, with - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTE1rY1R4aGN2M3ZEaEIwQWNJYVduaGN0ZW8xRm5EOGp3dTVBQUtqQVdmbUZXS1QzMzFkNUl1QnNvbENYa3RjTDdTNmdrSDRHMjFfUmowblN6VENGVkVoSGc?oc=5" target="_blank">BITCOIN ETF OUTFLOWS SLOW BUT CONTINUE …

item.title: Blockchain researchers warn HTX sanctions may blur crypto risk signals
item.description: Researchers say broad HTX tainting could freeze legitimate users and make compliance tools less useful for tracing illicit funds.

item.title: A16z, Paradigm lead $175 million bet to move global credit markets onchain
item.description: Morpho secured $175 million from Paradigm, a16z crypto and Ribbit as the lending protocol seeks to become foundational infrastructure for onchain credit markets.

item.title: 'This cycle bitcoin is a 40 vol asset, last one it was 60 and time before that it was 80' - Jim Ferraioli, Schwab's Dir of Crypto Research on btc getting more chill despite recent bear mkt, says it's suffering from strong momo elsewhere (AI, stocks). Also said 20% of t - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE9aQ1JPeEo0RnQwUmxaR24zdjNDT0c4Snh2ZDF4WUFzak8xUGVON29OQW1xS0I0MGtTZ1d4ZFpUb3lWSEktMEoxUG9QS3EwNDI0VlJTdHN0NFBiZzBmUG1pSUl2V2M?oc=5" target="_blank">'This cycle bitcoin is a 40 vol…

item.title: Privacy push as StarkWare and Sui move toward compliance-ready confidential transfers
item.description: StarkWare and Sui roll out confidential transfer systems as Zama boosts compliance efforts and Zcash’s Orchard bug highlights risks in shielded privacy models.

item.title: Nearly half of the bitcoin:native circulating supply was in profit at the cycle peak. Today, that figure has fallen sharply as over 8M BTC sit underwater, highlighting the scale of the recent market reset. 📉 glassno.de/4unfmj6 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTE5JUFR6SUxhQ0stcTRPMFdiY3A3TWlyOG5UdXJRNXU4LUt1ZnE0SzFvZWdEaXZZMjA3TWlzT1dxOEZTU25QMC1yQVp1OHZDbEE1M0Y4NzljRDZORVE0ZUE4?oc=5" target="_blank">Nearly half of the bitcoin:native circ…

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: AAVE Drops 2.6% as all constituents trade lower
item.description: Uniswap (UNI), down 2.9% from Monday, joined Aave (AAVE) as an underperformer.

item.title: Bitcoin inflows slow sharply in 2026 as investors chase AI, Bernstein says
item.description: Bernstein said bitcoin's increasingly diversified ownership base supports its long-term store-of-value thesis.

item.title: 5 years ago, El Salvador passed the first 'Bitcoin Law' that regulated BTC as legal tender 🇸🇻 Today, they now own 7,677 BTC worth $480 million. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTFBNMzlnTmxGekJrRkJXWGMtR2wtcFBCczczazV5SzFacWVxQ0c2NG1OdHY5bGtEcDdSZ09YVUtjMHdPUHowTGxZQlpFdU04RlBDUHZySFdRRzUtd0YwQXJ6bm82WlFIc0U?oc=5" target="_blank">5 years ago, El Salvador pa…

item.title: BlackRock warns of energy shock as May CPI is set to show acceleration in inflation
item.description: BlackRock is closely watching Wednesday's CPI as an early test of how U.S.-Iran tensions are feeding into already elevated prices in the economy.

item.title: Live updates: Bitcoin narrows early losses, returns to $62,000 as Nasdaq bounces to close down 1%
item.description: Crypto prices rose on Monday following last week's crash, but the bears still appear to be in control.

item.title: MiCA architect says EU should prioritize tokenization over DeFi rules
item.description: One of MiCA's architects said he sees no need to regulate DeFi as the European Commission gathers feedback on the framework's future.

item.title: Bitcoin 'normal' 4-year cycle puts focus on $53K low before 2028 BTC price high
item.description: Bitcoin trader said that BTC price was approaching its cycle bottom "window" with the $53,000 cycle midpoint a potential buy-in level.

item.title: Humanity says compromised laptop led to $36M bridge attack
item.description: Humanity Protocol's Terence Kwok said some multisig keys may have been accidentally backed up to a compromised device during setup.

item.title: Wall Street will run entirely on the blockchain by 2030, says Brickken CEO
item.description: Edwin Mata argues that EU regulations are choking local startups, leaving the U.S. and automated AI tools to run the future of tokenized finance.

item.title: This is Bitcoin's Shallowest Bear Market—But is the Bottom In?
item.description: Bitcoin is down 50% from its all-time high in the shallowest bear market to date—but analysts caution that the bottom isn't in yet.

item.title: Humanity's $36 million exploit tied to compromised laptop hosting a 'multisig' wallet
item.description: The compromised laptop held enough multisig keys to take over the project's bridges on two chains, a basic security failure for a startup backed by Pantera and Jump Crypto.

item.title: #Bitcoin is stalling beneath $65K as breaking that level would trigger a strong run to $72-74K. The $65K support level was the previous level of support after the crash early in February and is now acting as the resistance to break through. If it happens for Bitcoi - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE5nbmY5UTd4aFpsQkczVFRad0JpY3BjM1FJM2l3Z2h3QXZjb21Dc1lscER5RGh0bVdKUldjR0p0SV9DdzZZcmxnbEo5akplay10dGhzWFpET3RlenBnVTJQS092bw?oc=5" target="_blank">#Bitcoin is stalling beneath $65…

item.title: Breaking news. @krakenfx is now the Official Crypto Exchange Supporter of the @FIFAWorldCup 2026™️ in North America and Europe. Done deal, confirmed. The top stage in football and top name in investing. HERE WE GO! #ad - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE1OSzMyNy1CeFFnYld0emFGM1NvVWVvdUJEWnA1NC1jUGhWN3VLaGlHb3JxOUdPbjhBbTVhc2tRdTAybEdYV0dGaUV4bUhCdnF0c0REcHh2UUFrb09CM01MMUFxSDV6QQ?oc=5" target="_blank">Breaking news. @krakenfx is …

item.title: OKX expands X-Perps in Europe with Magnificent 7, gold and oil futures
item.description: OKX rolls out stock-linked expiry futures for European retail traders, expanding competition with Coinbase, Kraken and Binance in regulated derivatives.

item.title: Morning Minute: Saylor is Back to Buying
item.description: Saylor answers doubts with a $100M purchase. Citrini just called Hyperliquid a buy. And SBF is formally asking Trump for a pardon.

item.title: Bitcoin's bounce isn't a bullish revival, with anything from $68,000 to $80,000 seen as a marker
item.description: Your day-ahead look for June 9, 2026

item.title: Humanity Protocol Loses $36M After Private Keys 'Compromised,' Token Crashes 73%
item.description: The decentralized identity protocol said a compromised employee's laptop let attackers seize its bridges and mint tokens at will.

item.title: Strategy's bitcoin purchase fails to stir BTC price
item.description: Bitcoin is little changed despite a new purchase by Strategy as risk-averse investors await U.S. inflation data and next week’s Fed meeting.

item.title: SBI Shinsei links bank deposits to crypto rewards in Japan: Nikkei
item.description: SBI will give out vouchers that can be redeemed for Bitcoin, Ether or XRP through SBI VC Trade, linking bank savings with the group’s crypto exchange arm.

item.title: Circle debuts cirBTC on Ethereum to challenge Coinbase in the wrapped bitcoin market
item.description: Circle unveiled cirBTC, a token backed 1:1 by the world's largest cryptocurrency, to allow traders to use their bitcoin wealth in DeFi protocols.

item.title: USDT's flashing a golden cross and that may be bad news for bitcoin
item.description: USDT's dominance rate has flashed a golden crossover in a sign of caution for the broader crypto market.

item.title: Bitcoin Demand Hits a Level Seen Only 3 Times Since 2019 “The current setup therefore looks less like a confirmed reversal and more like the beginning of a final cleansing phase.” – By @MorenoDV_ - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTFBzTUJkS0VqcE5Gdm9RSTlUaE13M3pfMWxwbUc5ZllCakxzcXlDTFg3a2JRb0JlbGM0MFpiT0czRFdUVkxtelhoN3dfVzBzS0I3bTlxOXhJaUlnZnl1d0wzZGlNYmVhbzg?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitcoin Demand Hits a Level…

item.title: Coinbase and Cardless unveil credit card backed by stablecoins
item.description: The stablecoin-secured card is for situations where a credit card cannot be approved on an unsecured basis.

item.title: Merck and Hashgraph Group launch Hedera-based product passport for EU compliance
item.description: The Hedera-based platform combines product authentication and blockchain traceability to support compliance with new European Union sustainability and supply-chain reporting requirements.

item.title: Kraken signs FIFA World Cup 2026 partnership ahead of tourney kickoff
item.description: The crypto exchange will promote digital asset adoption through fan activations and product experiences at the first 48-team FIFA World Cup.

item.title: Over 200 crypto firms push Senate to pass CLARITY Act
item.description: Crypto lobby groups representing hundreds of organizations urged Senate leaders in a letter to schedule a vote on a key crypto bill ahead of the midterms.
